title: Reforms to agricultural property relief and business property relief
body: "This measure makes changes to the reliefs so that from 6 April 2026:    a new £1 million allowance will apply to the combined value of property in an estate qualifying for 100% business property relief or 100% agricultural property relief or both — relief at the lower rate of 50% will apply to the value of any qualifying relievable property over £1 million the rate of business property relief available will be reduced from 100% to 50% in all circumstances for shares admitted to trading on recognised stock exchanges designated as ‘not listed’ the option to pay Inheritance Tax by equal annual instalments over 10 years interest-free will be extended to all property which is eligible for agricultural property relief or business property relief  "
